name: SelectionMethod
summary: Defines enumerated values for several kinds of selection methods.

enum_values.name: MousePick
enum_values.summary: Selected by a mouse click on the object.

enum_values.name: WindowBox
enum_values.summary: Selected by a mouse selection window box. Window selection indicates the object is completely contained by the selection rectangle.

enum_values.name: CrossingBox
enum_values.summary: Selected by a mouse selection crossing box. A crossing selection indicates the object intersects with the selection rectangle.
